triggerExamples: Build a CRM pipeline risk dashboard for LastMile opportunities.
Create a sales dashboard showing account health and next actions.
Run the CRM dashboard runbook for this customer list.
confidenceHints: The user asks for a dashboard or app centered on CRM, pipeline, account, opportunity, sales, renewal, or customer-risk data.
The expected output is an interactive dashboard artifact rather than only a written summary.

inputs.label: Organization or segment
inputs.description: The company, account set, tenant, or sales segment the dashboard should cover.

inputs.label: CRM and supporting data sources
inputs.description: CRM, spreadsheet, connector, or workspace sources that should inform the dashboard.

confirmation.title: Build CRM Dashboard
confirmation.summary: Computer will discover CRM-relevant data, analyze pipeline and account risk, produce an interactive dashboard artifact, and validate that the result is grounded in the available evidence.
phaseSummary: Discover CRM entities, metrics, and available source data.
Analyze pipeline health, risk signals, and account priorities.
Validate layout, data grounding, and next-action usefulness.

phases.title: Discover CRM context
taskSeeds: Identify CRM entities, fields, and data freshness.
Inventory account, opportunity, owner, stage, amount, close-date, and risk signal coverage.

phases.title: Analyze pipeline and account risk
taskSeeds: Derive dashboard metrics, segments, risks, and priority accounts from discovered data.
Separate evidence-backed findings from assumptions or missing-data caveats.

phases.title: Produce dashboard artifact
taskSeeds: Generate an interactive CRM dashboard using the runbook phase guidance, `CrmDashboardData`, and Artifact Builder compatibility shim.
Persist the dashboard through `save_app` with CRM runbook metadata and the current thread id.

phases.title: Validate result
taskSeeds: Verify the dashboard matches the requested CRM scope and source evidence.
Check that all major claims are traceable to data or labeled assumptions.

outputs.title: CRM dashboard artifact
outputs.description: A generated interactive dashboard app for CRM pipeline and account review.

outputs.title: Evidence and assumptions
outputs.description: Notes summarizing source coverage, assumptions, and data gaps.
